---
pagetitle: "The iAM.AMR project"
toc: false
---

::: {.light-content}

![](assets/iamamr_logo.png){fig-alt="The iAM.AMR project logo. The logo consists of the text, 'iAM.AMR' in a black, blocky, sans-serif font, with the body of the lowercase 'i' styled as an elongated, red and white pill."}

:::


::: {.dark-content}

![](assets/iamamr_logo_white.png){fig-alt="The iAM.AMR project logo. The logo consists of the text, 'iAM.AMR' in a black, blocky, sans-serif font, with the body of the lowercase 'i' styled as an elongated, red and white pill."}

:::

***Integrated Assessment Model for Antimicrobial Resistance* (*iAM.AMR*)**

Welcome to the iAM.AMR project website.
